facts: Georgia has no state EV purchase rebate, though a prior $5k EV tax credit expired in 2015.
In Georgia, EVs pay a $200 annual registration fee.
Georgia allows HOV/Toll lane access with an AFV tag for EVs.
Some utility rebates are available in Georgia, such as Georgia Power offering a $250 charger rebate.
Atlanta offers parking perks for EVs.
Volvo is building a U.S. factory in Ridgeville, South Carolina in partnership with Polestar.
Volvo has plans for American-built EVs, including the upcoming EX90 electric SUV.
Volvo currently operates a manufacturing plant in South Carolina that produces the S60 sedan.
Volvo's South Carolina plant will produce the upcoming EX90 electric vehicle.
source_title: Does Volvo XC90 Qualify for Tax Credit? - Avoid This Mistake + FAQs
